name: Dynasty OS — V3 Automation Command Layer

values.content: You are Dynasty OS — Shylow Thompson's real estate investment intelligence system. Write concise, action-oriented daily briefs. Use bullet points. Flag anything requiring immediate attention with 🚨.

=Generate today's Dynasty OS daily brief:

{{ JSON.stringify($json, null, 2) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ event: 'daily_brief_sent', trigger: 'schedule', timestamp: new Date().toISOString(), result: $('Daily Brief: AI Fallback').item.json.aiError ? 'ai_fallback' : 'success' }) }}

options.systemMessage: You are Dynasty OS — Shylow Thompson's real estate investment intelligence system. You analyze deals, score leads, evaluate capital stacks, and provide strategic recommendations for flips, build-to-sell, and rental exits in Atlanta and surrounding markets. Be concise, data-driven, and decisive. Always state GO or NO-GO with supporting numbers when analyzing deals.

parameters.name: flip_analysis
parameters.description: Analyze a fix-and-flip deal. Required JSON body fields: purchase_price (number), repair_budget (number), arv (number). Optional: closing_costs, holding_costs, selling_costs. Returns decision (GO/NO-GO), profit, and ROI.

parameters.name: lead_score
parameters.description: Look up a lead's current score and grade. Provide lead_id (UUID). Returns the lead record including score (0-100), grade (A-D), status, and scoring breakdown.

parameters.name: capital_stack
parameters.description: Get current Dynasty capital position — available funds, deployed capital, and investor commitments.

parameters.name: build_analysis
parameters.description: Calculate the optimal offer price for a Land + Build deal. Required fields: property_id (string), arv (number). Optional: repair_cost (default 0), exit_strategy (default 'Flip'), target_roi (default 0.20), holding_cost_monthly (default 0), holding_months (default 12). Returns the recommended offer and supporting metrics.
parameters.jsonBody: ={property_id: {property_id}, arv: {arv}, repair_cost: {repair_cost}, exit_strategy: {exit_strategy}, target_roi: {target_roi}, holding_cost_monthly: {holding_cost_monthly}, holding_months: {holding_months}}

parameters.name: disposition_plan
parameters.description: Get Dynasty disposition profit analysis and exit strategy comparison across wholesale, flip, rental, and owner-finance exits.

parameters.name: investor_summary
parameters.description: Get list of active Dynasty investors, their capital commitments, and contact details.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ output: $json.output, sessionId: ($('Chat: Webhook').item.json.body || $('Chat: Webhook').item.json).sessionId || null }) }}

parameters.message: =🚨 Dynasty OS ALERT: API is DOWN. Deal intake webhook received but PropertyOS API is unreachable. Check Railway/backend immediately.

parameters.subject: 🚨 Dynasty OS: API DOWN — Deal Intake Blocked
parameters.message:
=Dynasty PropertyOS API is unreachable.

A deal intake webhook was received but could not be processed because the backend API is down.

Deal data received:
{{ JSON.stringify($json, null, 2) }}

Action required: Check Railway deployment and restart the backend service.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'error', message: 'Dynasty PropertyOS API is currently unavailable. Your deal has been logged. Check back shortly.', timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ purchase_price: $json.purchase_price, repair_budget: $json.repair_budget, arv: $json.arv, closing_costs: $json.closing_costs, holding_costs: $json.holding_costs, selling_costs: $json.selling_costs }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ property_id: $json.property_id || null, asking_price: $json.purchase_price, arv: $json.arv, repairs: $json.repair_budget }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ deal_id: $('Deal Intake: Create Deal').item.json.id, decision: 'GO', approved_by: 'dynasty_os_automation', notes: 'Auto-approved by Dynasty OS Deal Intake workflow' }) }}

values.content: You are Dynasty OS. Write a concise deal summary for squad review. Include: address, key numbers, decision rationale, and 3 recommended next steps. Use bullet points. Max 300 words.

parameters.subject: =🏠 Dynasty OS GO Deal — {{ $('Deal Intake: Validate').item.json.address }}
=❌ Dynasty OS NO-GO — {{ $json.address }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ event: 'deal_intake', trigger: 'webhook', address: $('Deal Intake: Validate').item.json.address, decision: $('Deal Intake: Flip Analysis').item.json.decision, roi: $('Deal Intake: Flip Analysis').item.json.roi, deal_id: (function(){ try { return $('Deal Intake: Create Deal').item.json?.id || null; } catch(e) { return null; } })(), property_id: (function(){ try { return $('Deal Intake: Resolve Property').item.json?.property_id || null; } catch(e) { return null; } })(), timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'received', decision: $('Deal Intake: Flip Analysis').item.json.decision, address: $('Deal Intake: Validate').item.json.address, roi: $('Deal Intake: Flip Analysis').item.json.roi, profit: $('Deal Intake: Flip Analysis').item.json.profit, deal_id: (function(){ try { return $('Deal Intake: Create Deal').item.json?.id || null; } catch(e) { return null; } })() }) }}

parameters.subject: =🔥 Dynasty OS HOT LEAD — Score {{ $('Hot Lead: Score').item.json.score }}/100

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ event: 'hot_lead_detected', trigger: 'webhook', lead_id: $('Hot Lead: Validate').item.json.lead_id, score: $('Hot Lead: Score').item.json.score, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'routed', lead_id: $('Hot Lead: Validate').item.json.lead_id, score: $('Hot Lead: Score').item.json.score, tier: Number($('Hot Lead: Score').item.json.score) >= 80 ? 'HOT' : 'WARM' }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ deal_id: $('Deal Status: Validate').item.json.deal_id, decision: 'GO', approved_by: 'dynasty_os_automation', notes: $('Deal Status: Validate').item.json.notes || '' }) }}

nodes.name: Deal Status: CAP GAP - Get Capital

parameters.subject: =👥 Dynasty OS: Investor Interest — Deal {{ $('Deal Status: Validate').item.json.deal_id }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ event: 'deal_status_changed', deal_id: $('Deal Status: Validate').item.json.deal_id, status: $('Deal Status: Validate').item.json.status, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'routed', deal_id: $('Deal Status: Validate').item.json.deal_id, event: $('Deal Status: Validate').item.json.status }) }}

values.content: You are Dynasty OS Capital Command. Generate a capital gap brief. State: gap amount, available capital, nearest investors to activate, and 3 immediate actions. Be direct and numbers-first.

parameters.subject: 💰 Dynasty OS: Capital Gap — Action Required

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ event: 'capital_gap_detected', ai_error: $('Capital Gap: AI Fallback').item.json.aiError || false, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

parameters.subject: =✅ Draw Approved — ${{ Number($('Draw Request: Validate').item.json.draw_amount).toLocaleString() }} | {{ $('Draw Request: Validate').item.json.milestone }}

parameters.text:
=✅ Draw Released: ${{ Number($('Draw Request: Validate').item.json.draw_amount).toLocaleString() }} — {{ $('Draw Request: Validate').item.json.milestone }}
Deal {{ $('Draw Request: Validate').item.json.deal_id }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ event: 'draw_request_submitted', deal_id: $('Draw Request: Validate').item.json.deal_id, draw_amount: $('Draw Request: Validate').item.json.draw_amount, milestone: $('Draw Request: Validate').item.json.milestone, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'processed', deal_id: $('Draw Request: Validate').item.json.deal_id, draw_amount: $('Draw Request: Validate').item.json.draw_amount, milestone: $('Draw Request: Validate').item.json.milestone }) }}

values.content: You are Dynasty OS ATLAS. Analyze project delays with financial precision. Quantify: daily carry cost, total profit erosion, revised exit date, and updated ROI. Recommend 3 immediate corrective actions. Flag if deal falls below 20% ROI.

=Delay report: {{ JSON.stringify(($('Project Delay: Webhook').item.json.body || $('Project Delay: Webhook').item.json)) }}

Deal record: {{ JSON.stringify($('Project Delay: Get Deal').item.json) }}

parameters.message: =🚨 ATLAS: Project delayed! Deal {{ ($('Project Delay: Webhook').item.json.body || $('Project Delay: Webhook').item.json).deal_id }}. Days: {{ ($('Project Delay: Webhook').item.json.body || $('Project Delay: Webhook').item.json).days_delayed }}. Check Slack for impact analysis.

parameters.subject: =🚨 Dynasty ATLAS: Project Delay — Deal {{ ($('Project Delay: Webhook').item.json.body || $('Project Delay: Webhook').item.json).deal_id }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ event: 'project_delayed', deal_id: ($('Project Delay: Webhook').item.json.body || $('Project Delay: Webhook').item.json).deal_id, days_delayed: ($('Project Delay: Webhook').item.json.body || $('Project Delay: Webhook').item.json).days_delayed, ai_error: $('Project Delay: AI Fallback').item.json.aiError || false, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'atlas_alerted', deal_id: ($('Project Delay: Webhook').item.json.body || $('Project Delay: Webhook').item.json).deal_id }) }}

values.content: You are Dynasty OS. Draft a professional investor package announcement. Lead with projected returns and timeline. Include deal highlights and a clear call to action. Keep under 250 words — investors are busy.

=Package details: {{ JSON.stringify(($('Investor Package: Webhook').item.json.body || $('Investor Package: Webhook').item.json)) }}
Active investors: {{ JSON.stringify($('Investor Package: Get Investors').item.json) }}

parameters.subject: =📊 Dynasty OS: Investor Package — {{ ($('Investor Package: Webhook').item.json.body || $('Investor Package: Webhook').item.json).deal_name || 'New Deal' }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ event: 'investor_package_generated', deal_name: ($('Investor Package: Webhook').item.json.body || $('Investor Package: Webhook').item.json).deal_name, ai_error: $('Investor Package: AI Fallback').item.json.aiError || false, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

main.node: Deal Status: CAP GAP - Get Capital
